title: Proof of Existence and Timestamping
description: Proof-of-existence protocols commit evidence to Bitcoin so anyone can later verify that a document or statement existed no later than a particular time, without storing the entire document on-chain.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for hashes, commitments, transactions, and Bitcoin data anchoring.

resources.title: OpenTimestamps
resources.notes: Open protocol and implementation for decentralized timestamp proofs.

resources.title: Bitcoin Genesis Block
resources.notes: Historical example of a time-bound message embedded in Bitcoin's launch block.
